headline: Tesla rolls out unsupervised robotaxis in Austin
summary: Tesla said on Wednesday it was rolling out its unsupervised robotaxis ‌in the Austin Metro area in Texas, ‌as the electric-vehicle maker looks to speed up its autonomous ​ride-hailing operation.  Expanding the robotaxi service and wider adoption of its full self-driving software - a version of which underpins the technology - is key to Tesla's growth ‌strategy after CEO ⁠Elon Musk pivoted the company's focus from EVs to AI and robotics.  The service ​has been operating ​in Austin for nearly ‌a year, where customers sometimes experience wait times in excess of 30 minutes.

content.title: Tesla rolls out unsupervised robotaxis in Austin
content.summary: Tesla said on Wednesday it was rolling out its unsupervised robotaxis ‌in the Austin Metro area in Texas, ‌as the electric-vehicle maker looks to speed up its autonomous ​ride-hailing operation.  Expanding the robotaxi service and wider adoption of its full self-driving software - a version of which underpins the technology - is key to Tesla's growth ‌strategy after CEO ⁠Elon Musk pivoted the company's focus from EVs to AI and robotics.  The service ​has been operating ​in Austin for nearly ‌a year, where customers sometimes experience wait times in excess of 30 minutes.

headline: What's justifying SpaceX's $2T valuation target ahead of IPO?
summary: According to Reuters, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is gunning for an IPO date of Friday, June 12, with hopes to begin trading on the Nasdaq at $135 per share. This could launch the value of Elon Musk's private space operator to $2 trillion. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian lays out the most valuable segments of the space company that Wall Street is watching.

content.title: What's justifying SpaceX's $2T valuation target ahead of IPO?
content.description:
According to Reuters, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is gunning for an IPO date of Friday, June 12, with hopes to begin trading on the Nasdaq at $135 per share. This could launch the value of Elon Musk's private space operator to $2 trillion.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian lays out the most valuable segments of the space company that Wall Street is watching.

headline: Exclusive-Uber's commitment to self-driving startup Nuro is close to $500 million, sources say
summary: Uber has committed close to half a billion dollars in self-driving startup Nuro, two sources directly aware of the matter told Reuters, detailing the ‌extent of a major investment by the ride-hailing company in developing commercial robotaxis.  Uber has ​been positioning itself as a platform for the nascent industry and has partnered with many autonomous vehicle companies, including Chinese tech giant Baidu, U.S. electric vehicle maker Rivian, and British startup Wayve.  One of Uber's commitments is a three-way partnership with Nuro and electric vehicle company Lucid to roll ‌out 35,000 robotaxis using Lucid's Gravity ⁠SUVs and upcoming midsize vehicles, Nuro's technology and Uber's platform.

content.title: Exclusive-Uber's commitment to self-driving startup Nuro is close to $500 million, sources say
content.summary: Uber has committed close to half a billion dollars in self-driving startup Nuro, two sources directly aware of the matter told Reuters, detailing the ‌extent of a major investment by the ride-hailing company in developing commercial robotaxis.  Uber has ​been positioning itself as a platform for the nascent industry and has partnered with many autonomous vehicle companies, including Chinese tech giant Baidu, U.S. electric vehicle maker Rivian, and British startup Wayve.  One of Uber's commitments is a three-way partnership with Nuro and electric vehicle company Lucid to roll ‌out 35,000 robotaxis using Lucid's Gravity ⁠SUVs and upcoming midsize vehicles, Nuro's technology and Uber's platform.

thumbnail.caption: Uber logo seen on a taxi in Dublin
